notes:
## Canonical scanner consolidation

- Makes the verified `number-change-detector` v0.6.1 PTS-aware scanner the single production scan path.
- Adds canonical Fast, Balanced, Precise, Monotonic Turbo, and Quick PTS profiles while retaining exact Media3 clip export.
- Video A API 35 QA: 10 confirmed transitions, ten clips, 400-second output, and 159.804 seconds end-to-end (197.476 seconds faster than v0.17.26).
